creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Neither <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/faq/#forgot-root-pw> nor <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/book/#boot-singleuser> mentions what's probably the most user-friendly approach to single user mode: 

* the menu

– pictured at <https://byte-sized.de/linux-unix/freebsd-password-reset-fuer-root/>.

At <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/book/#bsdinstall-view-probe>, one of these two must be a misnomer: 

> FreeBSD Boot Menu

> FreeBSD Boot Loader Menu

– be consistent.
